visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with dark hair tied back wears a black and white striped shirt and black overalls. She is in a brightly lit indoor room with a plain wall and a ceiling vent. She drinks from a pink smoothie cup with a large straw. Large yellow text overlays are prominently displayed. (2) A close-up shot shows a hand holding a plastic smoothie cup filled with frozen fruit (blueberries and bananas) alongside a red bottle of Yakult Y1000. The background is a brightly lit convenience store refrigerator. (3) The hand reaches into a 7-Eleven freezer shelf packed with various colorful smoothie cups. (4) The hand selects a small red bottle of Yakult Y1000 from a refrigerated shelf. (5) The smoothie cup is placed into the circular slot of a specialized black and silver blending machine. The lid of the cup has been removed. (6) The machine blends the fruit, and then the hand pours the creamy, light-yellow Yakult liquid into the newly blended purple smoothie cup, filling it to the brim. (7) The hand uses a pink straw to stir the purple mixture inside the clear plastic cup. (8) Back in the initial indoor setting, the woman drinks the completed purple smoothie through the straw and gives a thumbs-up to the camera with a satisfied expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 日本7-11限定. (2) [Slogan]: 世界級喝法. (3) [Slogan]: 7-11 Smoothie 巴西莓香蕉. (4) [Slogan]: Yakult Y1000 養樂多. (5) [Slogan]: 冰沙專用機 -開始前記得掃條碼-. (6) [Slogan]: 完成後加入養樂多 -會剛剛好滿杯-. (7) [Slogan]: 攪拌就完成啦. (8) [Slogan]: 去日本一定要喝看看!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing at the beginning and end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian female with dark hair, wearing a striped T-shirt and black overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between a neutral indoor room (likely a hotel or home) and the interior of a 7-Eleven store, specifically the refrigerated aisles and the beverage preparation area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy J-Pop music with a female vocal begins. The track has a fast tempo and bright synthesizer textures. (2) A sharp 'Pop' sound effect triggers as the text overlay changes, coinciding with a visual cut to the store products. (3) A subtle plastic clink is heard as the smoothie cup is grabbed from the freezer, followed by a light thud. (4) A mechanical whirring and grinding sound persists while the smoothie is being processed in the machine. (5) A distinct liquid pouring sound occurs as the Yakult is added to the cup. (6) The music reaches a playful peak with a final sparkling sound effect as the woman gives a thumbs up, finishing with a hard audio cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Result -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a popular food hack/recommendation for a specific beverage combination (Smoothie + Yakult) found at 7-Eleven stores in Japan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on demonstrating how to consume specific brand-name products (7-Eleven Smoothies and Yakult) together.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and bright text overlays typical of short-form social media content to maintain high viewer engagement while delivering a simple tutorial.
